name: goalpost
description: Goalpost — autonomous stage x goal orchestration for Claude Code with Codex delegation.

plugins.name: goalpost
plugins.description: Plan a project into a stage x goal roadmap with hard acceptance gates, then run it hands-off with a persistent ledger, delegating engineering goals to Codex (right-sized across GPT-5.6 Sol/Terra/Luna) and creative goals to Claude Code, with tier escalation on failure and destructive ops isolated behind approval gates.
